title: 3-In-1 Cat Food And Water Bowl Set, Cat Bowls With Stand, Double Cat Bowls with Water Dispenser For Pet，Food And Water Feeder For Small Medium Dogs Cats
features: ● 3-in-1 Cat Food And Water Bowl Set: Save space and provide convenience for your cat’s feeding needs with this all-in-one pet food and water bowl set!
● Pet Bowls With Stand: The 15° angled design tilted pet bowl makes it easier for cats to eat and drink comfortably, promotes healthy digestion, reducing neck and joint strain for your furry friend.

● Double Cat Bowls With Water Dispenser For Pet: Keep your cat hydrated with the included water dispenser - no need for separate dishes! Two plastic food bowls can hold dry food and wet food or treat separately.

● Easy to Clean Pet Feeding Dishes: humanized separation design, detachable parts, simple structure, no dead corners, easy to clean, no bacteria. The floating disk prevents wetting pet’s mouth hairs when drinking,keep the water clean,500ML capacity is enough for your pet to drink for 2-3 days.

● Food And Water Feeder For Small Medium Dogs Cats: Perfect for cats of all sizes, puppy, small and medium dogs, this pet food and water bowls set is versatile and practical. A good gift for your dogs cats or your pet-owning friend.
description: Product Name: 3-in-1 Cat Food And Water Bowl Set Color: Gray Product Dimensions : 40CM * 21CM *14.5CM Product Weight: 370g Introducing our 3-In-1 Cat Food And Water Bowl Set, the ultimate solution for pet owners who are looking for a convenient, hassle-free way to provide food and water to their furry friends. This set includes two bowls, one for dry food or wet food and the other for water. The bowls are tilted at a comfortable angle for your furry friend and the set comes with a stand that elevates the bowls off the floor. Our double cat bowls feature a water dispenser that automatically dispenses water when the water level gets low. This ensures your pet always has enough water to stay hydrated. The food bowl and water bowl are removable, making cleaning easy and hassle-free. This means that you can easily clean and refill the bowls without having to disrupt your cat's mealtime routine. The cat bowl set is suitable for small and medium-sized cats and dogs, and the stand is designed to be sturdy and stable, preventing any spills and tipping over. We understand the importance of hygiene when it comes to your pets' bowl, and that is why our 3-in-1 Cat Food And Water Bowl Set is made with high-quality, non-toxic, durable plastic that is easy to clean. The bowls are dishwasher safe, making maintenance even more effortless. In conclusion, our 3-In-1 Cat Food And Water Bowl Set with a water dispenser is the perfect solution for pet owners who are looking for convenience, durability, and hygiene. This set is an excellent addition to your cat's mealtime routine providing them a comfortable feeding experience. The tilted cat bowl set makes it easy for your pet to eat and drink without straining their neck and is suitable for feeding both wet and dry food. Order now and enjoy a hassle-free feeding experience for you and your pet!
